headline: Coca-Cola’s new flavors reveal larger strategy
summary: Coca-Cola (KO) just gave its fans something new, but it’s not making it easy to get. The beverage giant just rolled out five new flavors, doubling down on a strategy that looks far from being a typical soda launch and more of a scarcity play.
